ExecutionPacket.purpose: Context packet emitted by controller at wave boundaries and checkpoints

fields.field-step: Current step name and sequence number
fields.field-assumptions: What the worker assumed during this step

GraphDelta.purpose: Proposed changes to knowledge-graph.xml during execution

VerificationDelta.purpose: Proposed changes to verification-plan.xml during execution

fields.field-updated-module-checks: Check list updates for existing entries

FailurePacket.purpose: Handoff packet when a step fails and needs human or controller review

fields.field-expected-evidence: What evidence was expected (tests, logs, markers)
fields.field-first-divergent-block: First semantic block where observed diverges from expected
fields.field-suggested-next-action: What the reviewer should do next
